patterns.label: Bridge disconnected regions
patterns.minimal_test_template: Use the smallest available dataset split to test whether {anchor} and {candidate} show a measurable shift under {relation}.
patterns.falsifier_template: If the effect between {anchor} and {candidate} is absent under matched controls, this bridge hypothesis is likely spurious.

patterns.label: Resolve contradictions
patterns.minimal_test_template: Run a two-condition contrast around {anchor}->{candidate} and verify whether directionality is stable across preprocessing choices.
patterns.falsifier_template: If both conditions yield the same slope/sign with confidence intervals overlapping zero difference, contradiction resolution is unsupported.

patterns.label: Controlled OOD search
patterns.minimal_test_template: Evaluate {candidate} as an OOD extension of {anchor} with one cheap discriminating metric tied to {query}.
patterns.falsifier_template: If OOD gain disappears after cost-matched baseline controls, treat this candidate as low-leverage novelty.
